properties.name: --arcgis-histogram-bar-color
properties.description: Specifies the color of the histogram bars when the bin doesn't have a corresponding color stop.

properties.name: --arcgis-histogram-stop-color
properties.description: Specifies the default color for color stops.

properties.name: --arcgis-ticks-tick-length
properties.description: Specifies the length of the ticks.

properties.name: --arcgis-ticks-tick-color
properties.description: Specifies the color of the ticks.

properties.name: --arcgis-ticks-gap
properties.description: Specifies the gap between the ticks and labels.
